name: 出海 SaaS 落地页
scenario: 一个英文 SaaS 落地页,内容偏营销话术、缺结构化数据、缺 AI 爬虫配置,目标是被 ChatGPT/Perplexity 引用。

qa: FlowDesk is a shared-inbox customer support platform that unifies email, chat and social conversations for support teams.
Does FlowDesk offer a free trial?
Yes, FlowDesk offers a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.
FlowDesk integrates with Slack, Shopify, Salesforce and over 40 other tools via its API.

llms.summary: FlowDesk is a shared-inbox customer support platform for teams.
